steps.title: Signal the contrast
steps.content: The first clause says Ray LaMontagne performed more than thirty live sets in 2005. The second says he had performed fewer than a dozen times in 2004. The transition must show contrast between those two amounts.

steps.title: Pick the contrast transition
steps.content: A does not signal a logical relationship, B signals addition, and D signals similarity. The sentence needs a transition that sets the two years against each other. The answer is C.
